title: Hero Section Generator
description: Generate a complete hero section for a landing page with headline, subtext, and a call-to-action button.
prompt:
Add a hero section to my HTML page with:
- A large headline: "{{HEADLINE}}"
- A subheading: "{{SUBHEADING}}"
- A call-to-action button labeled "{{CTA_TEXT}}" that links to "{{CTA_LINK}}"
- A badge/pill label above the headline that says "{{BADGE_TEXT}}"

Style requirements:
- Use the existing CSS custom properties (--accent, --bg, --text, etc.) if they exist
- Centered layout, generous padding (at least 5rem top/bottom)
- The headline should be large (clamp between 2.4rem and 3.6rem)
- Dark background preferred
- Responsive on mobile

Output only the HTML and any new CSS needed. Do not change anything else on the page.

variables.name: HEADLINE
variables.description: Your main headline — the first thing people read

variables.name: SUBHEADING
variables.example: A one-day workshop where you go from idea to working application using AI as your co-pilot.

variables.name: CTA_TEXT
variables.description: The text on the primary action button

variables.name: BADGE_TEXT
variables.description: Short label in a pill badge above the headline

author: Krosebrook
